title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that as AI systems surpass human knowledge, the defining features of intelligence shift toward curiosity, judgment, and the ability to discover novel talent rather than knowledge accumulation. He uses mathematician Srinivasa Ramanujan as a historical example of genius that institutional systems missed, suggesting modern education must focus on finding and nurturing unconventional thinkers.
